'''鈭歞h-k-y-p''' ('''kadhakyepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wub|wub]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wub|wub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakyepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakyepoko|thidhakyepoko]] || [[word:jidhakyepoko|jidhakyepoko]] || [[word:shidhakyepoko|shidhakyepoko]] || [[word:kidhakyepoko|kidhakyepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakyepoko|thodhakyepoko]] || [[word:jodhakyepoko|jodhakyepoko]] || [[word:shodhakyepoko|shodhakyepoko]] || [[word:kodhakyepoko|kodhakyepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakyepoko|thodhakyepoko]] || [[word:jodhakyepoko|jodhakyepoko]] || [[word:shodhakyepoko|shodhakyepoko]] || [[word:kodhakyepoko|kodhakyepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhakyepoko|th忙dhakyepoko]] || [[word:j忙dhakyepoko|j忙dhakyepoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhakyepoko|sh忙dhakyepoko]] || [[word:k忙dhakyepoko|k忙dhakyepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhakyepoko|thadhakyepoko]] || [[word:jadhakyepoko|jadhakyepoko]] || [[word:shadhakyepoko|shadhakyepoko]] || [[word:kadhakyepoko|kadhakyepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
